item.title: Suicide Hotline Calls Surge With Rising Nighttime Temps
item.description: Extreme nighttime heat is linked to increased suicide crisis calls, including a 166% increase during the hottest temperatures, a new study shows. Meds...

item.title: Cenobamate Outperforms Other ASMs for Focal Epilepsy
item.description: Cenobamate is linked to better outcomes, but more adverse events, than three other antiseizure medications in patients with drug-resistant focal epile...

item.title: How These Doctors Fight the Social Media Trust War
item.description: As trust in healthcare erodes and disinformation thrives on social media, a small but determined group of physicians wants to win. Medscape Medical Ne...

item.title: SGA Children on Growth Hormone Show Impaired Metabolism
item.description: Children born small for gestational age vs those with isolated growth hormone deficiency have impaired glucose-insulin metabolism, which worsens durin...

item.title: Long-Term Air Pollution Exposure Tied to Increased AD Risk
item.description: An analysis of nearly 28 million Medicare beneficiaries indicates that long-term exposure to air pollution is a risk factor for Alzheimer’s Disease, e...
